stories.title: McIlroy Hosts Champions Dinner Tonight — Menu Revealed, Augusta Tradition Begins

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy is hosting the Masters Champions Dinner tonight at Augusta National.

On the menu: elk sliders, wagyu filet, sticky toffee pudding.

He earned the right to choose this menu by winning the Grand Slam in 2025. What a moment. 🍽️

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #McIlroy

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Champions Dinner is tonight at Augusta.

McIlroy hosts for the first time. Back injury behind him. Two days from defending his green jacket.

Every living Masters champion at the table. 🟢

#GolfFanrecap #Masters

stories.title: Masters 2026 — Two Days Away; First Round Thursday With $21M on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
THE MASTERS STARTS IN 2 DAYS. 🟢

91 players. $21M purse. 90th edition. Amazon Prime debut.

McIlroy defends alongside U.S. Amateur champ Mason Howell. Scheffler (No. 1, +500) is the favorite.

And the Par 3 Contest is TOMORROW. 🏌️

#GolfFanrecap #Masters

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Two days to Augusta. What to know:

Scheffler (+500) — World No. 1, chasing 3rd jacket
McIlroy (+1200) — defending, back scare behind him
DeChambeau (+1000) — back-to-back LIV wins

$21M purse. Amazon Prime debut.

Best major. Best week. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #Masters

stories.title: McIlroy Says Back "Wasn't an Issue" — No Longer Taking Painkillers Ahead of Defense

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
McIlroy on his back injury ahead of the Masters:

"Wasn't an issue. I'm no longer taking painkillers."

His last tournament was March 12. He missed 3+ weeks. Now he's defending his green jacket in 2 days.

All eyes on how he moves on 13 and 18. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #McIlroy

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The market isn't convinced on McIlroy.

Odds: +1000 to +1200. Trending down all week.

3-week break. Back injury. Augusta's elevation changes are unforgiving for back issues.

He says he's fine. Two days to prove it. 👀

#GolfFanrecap #Masters

stories.title: Scheffler Arrives at Augusta With 11-Day-Old Son Remy — "My Wife Is a Trooper"

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Scheffler arrived at Augusta with his wife and their 11-day-old son Remy.

Older son Bennett is also here. Both boys have attended a major as newborns.

"My wife is a trooper." — Scottie Scheffler 🟢

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Scheffler

stories.title: Par 3 Contest Tomorrow — Augusta's Beloved Pre-Tournament Tradition

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
TOMORROW: The Masters Par 3 Contest ⛳

Augusta National's 9-hole Par 3 course. Family caddies. Smiles, not scorecards.

Airs 2-4 PM ET on ESPN. Also on Masters.com.

And the superstition: No Par 3 winner has EVER won the Masters that same week. 👀

#GolfFanrecap #Masters

stories.title: Chevron Championship Preview — LPGA's First Major April 23-26 in Houston

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The LPGA's major season begins April 23-26 in Houston.

Chevron Championship. 16 days away.

Korda leads the tour in SG Total (4.00) and SG Tee-to-Green (5.55). Coughlin just won Aramco for her first LPGA title.

Big major. Big field. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #Chevron

Rahm: +950

Wide open. Best week in golf. 🟢
